definitions.text: The food and beverage a person or animal consumes.
examples: The diet of the giant panda consists mainly of bamboo.

definitions.text: Containing less fat, salt, sugar, or calories than normal, or claimed to have such.

examples: You folks reduce it to the bible only as being authoritative, impoverishing the faith. "Christianity Lite", diet Christianity for those who can't handle the Whole Meal.

definitions.text: To modify one's food and beverage intake so as to decrease or increase body weight or influence health.
examples: I've been dieting for six months, and I've lost some weight.

definitions.text: To regulate the food of (someone); to put on a diet.
To eat; to take one's meals.
A council or assembly of leaders; a formal deliberative assembly.
examples: They were given representation in some important diet committees.
